INSERT INTO _cp.Endpoint 
(
		EndPoint_ID, 
		API_Vendor_Name, 
		EndPoint_Name, 
		Base_URL, 
		Http_Method, 
		Default_Headers_JSON, 
		Pagination_Type, 
		Pagination_Config_JSON, 
		Run_Limits_JSON, 
		Processor_Function, 
		Processor_Config_JSON, 
		Is_Active, 
		CreatedUtc, 
		ModifiedUtc
) VALUES 
(
			{{End_Point_ID.text}}, 
			{{APIVendor_Name.text}}, 
			{{End_Point_Name.text}}, 
			{{Base_URL1.text}}, 
			{{Http_Method1.text}}, 
			{{Default_Header_Json.text}}, 
			{{Pagination_Type1.text}}, 
			{{Pagination_Config_Json.text}}, 
			{{Run_Limit_Json.text}}, 
			{{Processor_Function1.text}}, 
			{{Processor_Config_Json.text}}, 
			1, 
			CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
			CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
